Uses of Class
redis.clients.jedis.params.GeoSearchParam

  • Packages that use GeoSearchParam 
    Package Description
    redis.clients.jedis  
    redis.clients.jedis.commands
    This package contains the interfaces that contain methods representing Redis core commands.
    redis.clients.jedis.params
    This package contains the classes that represent optional parameters of core Redis commands.

    • Uses of GeoSearchParam in redis.clients.jedis

    • Uses of GeoSearchParam in redis.clients.jedis.commands

      Methods in redis.clients.jedis.commands with parameters of type GeoSearchParam 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      List<GeoRadiusResponse> GeoBinaryCommands.geosearch(byte[] key, GeoSearchParam params) 
      Response<List<GeoRadiusResponse>> GeoPipelineBinaryCommands.geosearch(byte[] key, GeoSearchParam params) 
      List<GeoRadiusResponse> GeoCommands.geosearch(String key, GeoSearchParam params)
      Return the members of a sorted set populated with geospatial information using GEOADD, which are within the borders of the area specified by a given shape.
      Response<List<GeoRadiusResponse>> GeoPipelineCommands.geosearch(String key, GeoSearchParam params) 
      long GeoBinaryCommands.geosearchStore(byte[] dest, byte[] src, GeoSearchParam params) 
      Response<Long> GeoPipelineBinaryCommands.geosearchStore(byte[] dest, byte[] src, GeoSearchParam params) 
      long GeoCommands.geosearchStore(String dest, String src, GeoSearchParam params)
      This command is exactly like GEOSEARCH but storing the results at dest.
      Response<Long> GeoPipelineCommands.geosearchStore(String dest, String src, GeoSearchParam params) 
      long GeoBinaryCommands.geosearchStoreStoreDist(byte[] dest, byte[] src, GeoSearchParam params) 
      Response<Long> GeoPipelineBinaryCommands.geosearchStoreStoreDist(byte[] dest, byte[] src, GeoSearchParam params) 
      long GeoCommands.geosearchStoreStoreDist(String dest, String src, GeoSearchParam params)
      This command is exactly like GEOSEARCHSTORE but storing the results with their destinations from the center point.
      Response<Long> GeoPipelineCommands.geosearchStoreStoreDist(String dest, String src, GeoSearchParam params)
